signals.headline: Fed Keeps Rates Unchanged Amid Rising Inflation Pressures; Kevin Warsh Nominated as Next Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Fed Keeps Rates Unchanged Amid Rising Inflation Pressures; Kevin Warsh Nominated as Next Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

The Federal Reserve on Wednesday elected to hold the federal funds rate steady after three prior cuts, as wholesale inflation (PPI) accelerated to 3% annually in December 2025—exceeding estimates—and PCE inflation hit 3% in December (up from 2.8% in November), with F

signals.headline: JD Vance Announces Notable Progress in Iran Negotiations from Pakistan | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
JD Vance Announces Notable Progress in Iran Negotiations from Pakistan | YES | MED confidence**
